title: MacBlog Winter Update
description: In this huge update to MacBlog, we changed the site's appearance a lot with a brand new redesign following the recent release of MacWeb Site Material 5.0. We also updated a bunch of tabs and content to enhance user experience and aesthetic on the platform.  Here's what's new with this big udpate:

mainarticles.p1: Since we rarely update MacBlog and it's one of our oldest apps, its styling, design, and UI were very outdated and chaotic, so with the recent release of MacWeb Site Material 5.0, we've decided to use this opportunity to compltely redesign the looks and layouts of MacBlog from the ground up on every single page using MacWeb Site Material 5.0. We made it so that the platform looks more consitent from page to page, more modern, and focuses your attention on the important information. We also made the user experience more intuitive and easier to navigate. From now on, you can enjoy an easier, more modern, organized, appealing, useful, and intuitive experience when using MacBlog! Some major changes including moving the Table of Contents inside the article itself instead of being on the right sidebar. This makes the page look less crowded 🖊️!
mainarticles.p2: We really made a lot of random changes this update, so it's kinda hard to categorize them into big sub sections for the update release log. First of all, we updated the Roadmap tab to adjust to slight changes of MacWeb's future plans. We also added a bunch of new update posts and other content across the platform. We renamed the Projects tab to the Apps tab and rearranged the items in the navigation bar as well. We also added a new update announcement modal to fit with the new Site Material 5.0 redesign. Other than that, we updated some content and moved the disclaimers to Terms and Conditions page 🔥.

others.other5: Fixed and updated sidebar and menu content.
others.other7: Removed Intro link on some pages.
others.other9: Removed featured update section on the Updates tab.
